cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: First time ordering from you. I want something soft and not too sweet. What should I try?

mustInclude: acknowledge the first-order uncertainty
anchor the reply in sweetness and texture preference
guide toward one practical next detail such as bread or dessert

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I need a birthday cake for 8 people this Saturday. We want something lighter, not too heavy on cream. What size should we look at?

mustInclude: recognize the celebration planning context
use headcount and lighter flavor preference in the reply
guide toward size range and any next detail such as fruit versus mousse direction
mustAvoid: acting like size choice is automatic

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: Can you do a two-tier dinosaur birthday cake by 6 tonight if I order now?

mustInclude: acknowledge the urgency
separate simple same-day options from true custom work
guide toward store, pickup time, and customization scope rather than promise
mustAvoid: pretending complex decoration does not affect readiness

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Will your butter croissants still be there around 10:30 at the mall branch?
context_window: user may be ready to visit

mustInclude: acknowledge the wish to avoid a wasted trip
mention that stock can vary by branch and timing
guide toward the next availability check

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We need pastry boxes for 25 people for a client meeting tomorrow afternoon and we need an invoice. Can your downtown store handle that?

mustInclude: recognize this as a real group order
ask for quantity confirmation, timing, and pickup or delivery details
guide toward a clear order follow-up naturally
mustAvoid: assuming every store handles bulk orders identically

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I need something nice to bring to my in-laws tomorrow. Do you have a bakery gift box that feels decent but not over the top?

mustInclude: acknowledge the gifting occasion
frame the answer around gifting tone, box count, or budget range
guide toward one practical next detail

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Can I use this birthday coupon at your campus store tonight if I order the cake in the app?
context_window: user may be close to ordering

mustInclude: acknowledge the offer question
mention that coupon rules can depend on store and ordering channel
guide toward confirming the next usable detail

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We need 15 breakfast boxes. What is the cheapest way to order from you? I do not care about anything fancy.

mustInclude: respect the budget focus
explain that the workable range still depends on item type or box scope
reframe toward one or two useful trade-offs

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Every bakery online says real butter and fresh cream. Why should I believe yours is any different?
context_window: user is skeptical but still engaged

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite a concrete quality concern like sweetness, bread texture, butter flavor, or cream feel
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My cake arrived smashed on one side and the writing was wrong too. Is this how you handle birthday orders?

mustInclude: empathy first
request store or order details through DM
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: asking for excessive personal details in comments

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: My son has a tree nut allergy. Can you guarantee zero cross-contact if we order the strawberry cake?

mustInclude: treat the allergy as serious
avoid making a zero-risk promise
move toward exact cake and store confirmation with human review

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I am pregnant and trying to keep sugar lower. Is your yogurt cheesecake definitely safe for me?

mustInclude: treat the concern as important
avoid making a safety or medical guarantee
move toward exact ingredient or nutrition confirmation with careful escalation

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: If I order now can you guarantee the cake will be ready by 5 exactly?

mustInclude: acknowledge the wish to avoid a delay
state that readiness depends on store load and cake scope
guide toward store and order details

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to place the order now.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move faster
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request store plus order details as the next action
mustAvoid: replying only with DM me and no context
